0002067876-26-000034.summary: Versant Media Group, Inc. (VSNT) filed this document to announce its definitive agreement to acquire Full Swing, a leading sports technology platform specializing in interactive golf, baseball, and multi-sport experiences. The acquisition aims to integrate Full Swing's interactive sports platform into Versant's portfolio, expanding its capabilities in immersive play, training, entertainment, and performance data, while building on Versant's leadership in golf and diversifying into other interactive sports experiences.

0001764046-26-000085.summary: This SEC filing details Clarivate PLC's strategic divestiture of its LS&H segment, which aims to generate cash proceeds for debt reduction, balance sheet strengthening, and shareholder value creation. The filing also reaffirms the company's 2026 financial outlook, reclassifying the divested segment as discontinued operations and noting an expected non-cash goodwill impairment.

0001731122-26-000910.summary: This SEC filing details Splash Beverage Group, Inc.'s acquisition of exclusive global licensing rights for CannEpil®, a proprietary cannabinoid-based therapeutic for drug-resistant epilepsy, from Argent BioPharma Limited. The purpose is to leverage CannEpil's existing international commercialization and regulatory progress to build a differentiated cannabinoid therapeutics platform, pursue U.S. regulatory advancement, and ultimately drive revenue and shareholder value.
keyword_instances: turing Practice (EU-GMP) standards. Drug-resistant epilepsy affects approximately 30% of epilepsy patients worldwide and remains one of the most significant unmet needs in neurology, with millions of patients continuing to experience uncontrolled seizures despite currently available therapies. “The acquisition of the exclusive global rights to CannEpil is an important step in our strategy to build a differentiated cannabinoid therapeutics platform. We believe CannEpil provides Splash with an exceptional opportunity to leverage existing international commercialization while pursuing U.S. regulatory advanc

Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SBEV) is a publicly traded company headquartered in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.
